description: Line/area chart for time series driven by DuckDB SQL query.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL query with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Must return 'label' and 'value' columns. Optional 'series' column for multi-line charts.

lineColor.description: Line color for single-series charts. Ignored when multiple series are present (auto-palette is used). Default is Fused lime yellow (#E8FF59).

showDots.description: Show data point dots on the line.

dotSize.description: Radius of data point dots in pixels.

activeDotSize.description: Radius of the active (hovered) data point dot in pixels.

showArea.description: Fill the area under the line with a gradient.

areaOpacity.description: Opacity of the area fill (0-1). Only used when showArea is true.

curveType.description: Interpolation curve: "linear" for straight segments, "smooth" for bezier curves, "step" for stepped lines.

showGrid.description: Show subtle grid lines behind the chart.

showLegend.description: Show legend for multi-series charts. Auto-hidden when there is only one series.

rotateLabels.description: Rotate x-axis labels -45 degrees. Useful for long date strings.

xAxisFontSize.description: Font size for x-axis labels in pixels.

yAxisFontSize.description: Font size for y-axis labels in pixels.

bottomMargin.description: Bottom margin in pixels. Overrides the auto-calculated value from rotateLabels. Useful when labels are clipped.

beginAtZero.description: Force the y-axis to start at 0. Ignored if yMin is set.

yMin.description: Fixed minimum value for the y-axis. Overrides beginAtZero.

yMax.description: Fixed maximum value for the y-axis.

animationMs.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. 0 disables animation. Animation only plays on data changes, not on zoom/resize.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "padding: 8px; background-color: #1a1a1a")

propsSchema.description: A line/area chart for time series data, powered by DuckDB SQL queries. Query must return 'label' and 'value' columns. Add a 'series' column for multiple lines.
